loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: This electrical meter does not measure run-hours, start counts, service intervals, or availability — these are engine-specific metrics not logged by the DG-3 MFM.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing active energy and power factor — reactive energy, apparent energy, MTBF, MTTR, and availability fractions are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active power, reactive power, and energy history — readiness scores and thresholds are not measured by this meter.

loop2: 'diesel-generator-asset-dashboard/operations-runtime' answers the prompt as routed; these cards cover quantities not recorded for this asset and render honest-blank per-leaf with the reason: Live Operations & Runtime (This electrical meter does not measure run-hours, start counts, service intervals, or availability — these are engine-specific metrics not logged by the DG-3 MFM.).
